tools.name: load_schema
tools.description: Load and parse an OpenAPI schema from a URL or file path.

parameters.name: url_or_path
parameters.description: URL or file path to OpenAPI schema

tools.name: list_endpoints
tools.description: List all endpoints defined in the loaded OpenAPI schema.

parameters.name: method
parameters.description: Filter by HTTP method (GET, POST, etc)

tools.name: get_endpoint_details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific endpoint including parameters and response schema.

tools.name: call_endpoint
tools.description: Make a request to an endpoint defined in the OpenAPI schema.
